scripts.clean-install-default:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts default dev false
scripts.clean-install-prod:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts prod production false
scripts.clean-install-collaudo:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts collaudo valid false
scripts.clean-install-dev:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts default dev true
scripts.build-default-dev:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts default dev false && npm run build --prefix ./app
scripts.build-default-prod:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts default production false && npm run build --prefix ./app
scripts.build-collaudo:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts collaudo valid false && npm run build --prefix ./app
scripts.build-prod:app: npm install && ts-node ./config/clean-install-app.ts prod production false && npm run build --prefix ./app
scripts.api-full-gen: npm run api-gen:default && npm run api-enhancers && npm run build --prefix ./api/api-library
